note: Employment figures correspond to [modeled ILO estimates](#dod:ilo-modelled-estimates). Employees definition is according to the [ICSE-93 standard](#dod:icse-93). Employment is defined in line with the [13th ICLS](#dod:13-icls). GDP per capita is expressed in [international-$](#dod:int_dollar_abbreviation) at 2021 prices.
title: Share of workers who are employees vs. GDP per capita
subtitle: Employees are defined by [ILO](#dod:ilo) as workers who work for an employer and receive wages or a salary. GDP per capita is adjusted for inflation and differences in living costs between countries.

display.name: Share of workers who are employees
